holdings.infoBox: ATTR is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Arin Tactical Tail Risk ETF (ATTR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, investing primarily in options and related instruments tied to US large-cap equities and equity indexes. The fund seeks to manage tail-risk exposures while generating return through its tactical options positioning ATTR was launched on Oct 27, 2025 and is issued by Arin.
